title: Global ProcScript Library
text: Global ProcScript Library A Global ProcScript Library contains Global ProcScript objects, which are linked into components at runtime when called from other ProcScript in the application. Characteristics Characteristics Icon: Object type code: libprc Main Development Object? Yes Part of: — Contains: Property , Global ProcScript Generalization: Main Development Object , Library Specializations: Compilation Output: — URI format: libprc: LibraryName Specialization Global ProcScript Library specializes Main Development Object and Library in the following ways: It can only contain Global ProcScript modules. Related Links Global ProcScripts Global ProcScripts are global objects that are located in a runtime library and can be called from any ProcScript in the application. They enable you to define common functionality for use by one or more applications. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
